video: Video 1: Full USD Scene Workflow from Scratch (12:17)

node_sequence.description: Creates the root scene Xform with Kind=Group
node_sequence.notes: The Primitive LOP defines the scene root. Kind=Group enables proper hierarchy delegation in USD. Child Xforms are created for each category.

parameters.os_variable: $OS evaluates to the node name, providing automatic unique naming

constraints: Always use Primitive LOP with Xform type and Kind=Group for the root hierarchy.
Four canonical child paths must exist: geo, LGT, MTL, cam.
$OS variable in primitive paths evaluates to the node name, providing automatic unique naming.
Hierarchy affects render delegation — Kind=Group enables proper USD assembly.
Consistent path convention across all nodes: /shot/{category}/$OS.
Every node in the chain must reference one of the four canonical paths.
test_criteria: Create Primitive LOP with /shot root. Verify: (1) Scene Outliner shows /shot as Xform with Kind=Group. (2) Four child paths (geo, LGT, MTL, cam) exist. (3) Adding a SOP Import with primpath /shot/geo/$OS places geometry under /shot/geo/<nodename>. (4) $OS substitution works correctly for all node types.

/shot/LGT.purpose: All lighting (physical sky, area lights, etc.)
